headline: Is It Time To Reevaluate Accenture (ACN) After Recent Share Price Slump?
summary: If you are wondering whether Accenture's current share price offers value or just more volatility, starting with a clear view of where the stock sits today can help you frame the opportunity and the risks. Accenture last closed at US$179.22, with the stock up 12.3% over the past week but down 8.1% over the past month, 31.1% year to date and 42.1% over the last year. Those moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in large IT services providers, where investors are weighing long term...
